posts.author: Sara413 (Sara Mahan)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would love to be able to stack filters using And/Or for more than one level. I can choose And/Or one time and then it defaults to whatever the previous selection was. It would be ideal if I could choose And/Or where circled in red below:
